description: Create a GSD todo file for a described problem with proper frontmatter
prompt: Create a GSD-style todo markdown file for this problem: 'The formatWidget function in src/utils.js does not handle widgets with missing name or type fields gracefully — it outputs [undefined] undefined'. The todo should have YAML frontmatter with: title, area (bug), priority (medium), created (2026-01-16). The body should describe the problem and suggest a fix approach. Output the complete todo file content.
